熱刺是一間座落英國倫敦北部托定咸區的職業足球會
從1882年成立至今已經擁有過百年歷史，現時競逐於英格蘭超級聯賽；
球會主場為白鹿徑球場，球會的拉丁文格言 ”Audere est Facere (To Dare Is To Do)” 則意謂「敢作敢為」








(部份圖片由淫心黃黃巴打提供)


榮耀：

甲組聯賽 冠軍：1950/1951、1960/1961
足總盃 冠軍：1900/1901、1920/1921、1960/1961、1961/1962、1966/1967、1980/1981、1981/1982、1990/1991
聯賽盃 冠軍：1970/1971、1972/1973、1998/1999、2007/2008
歐洲盃賽冠軍盃 冠軍：1962/1963
歐洲足協杯 冠軍：1971/1972、1983/1984

艾歷臣拒投巴塞：我想留喺熱刺
熱刺球星基斯甸艾歷臣是當今其中一個最出色的進攻中場，他在受訪中談到轉會問題，表示希望繼續留在熱刺。

有傳巴塞想羅致基斯甸艾歷臣，但這名丹麥中場表示會至少在熱刺留多兩年。

艾歷臣在2016年才與球會續約，他表示看不到原因要離隊。
「我與球會還有兩年合約，足球界經常都會有不同傳聞，至於巴塞的傳聞，我只可以說世上沒有人會拒絕加盟巴塞，但我曾經有機會加盟，不過感覺不太好。我知道自己這幾年仍能在巔峰比賽 ，大約有兩至三年，可能會留在熱刺，可能在其他球隊。」

基斯甸艾歷臣今季射入12球，交出15次助功。加盟4季總共為熱刺上陣179次。(Goal.com)

Trio of clubs in for Onomah

England Under-20’s World Cup glory has lead to a resurgence among Tottenham Hotspur fans in the almost forgotten-man Josh Onomah.

The midfielder only made three starts for Tottenham last season and twelve appearances in total with Harry Winks taking the limelight as the midfield prospect who has shown that he is capable of slotting into the team.

Onomah’s performances for England have cast him back into the spotlight and paper talk now claims that he is wanted by a trio of clubs on loan for the new season.

The Sun claim that Celtic, Brighton and Huddersfield are all keen to give the midfielder the opportunity to play regular football next season. Personally, I would discount Celtic from the race, we need to see if Onomah can cut it in the Premier League rather than in Scotland where an average player can look like Messi.

Either Brighton or Huddersfield could be a good fit. With former Spur Chris Hughton in charge of the Seagulls and David Wagner’s ever-growing reputation at Huddersfield, I’m sure he would get a fair crack.

Personally, I haven’t seen enough from Onomah in a Spurs shirt to date to say that he has the potential to be able to break into our side. Regardless of what happens, he needs regular football and I cannot see that happening at Tottenham this upcoming season.

法國RMC電台報導，尼斯拒絕羅馬為中場球員施利（Jean Michaël-Seri ）開出的第二次報價（約值2500萬歐元）。尼斯主席 Jean-Pierre Rivère表明，只有收到4000萬歐元的報價才讓施利離隊。

消息指，爭逐施利的球會有熱刺、PSG、巴塞隆拿和北京國安。國安已經向施利開出1000萬歐元年薪的合約，而熱刺亦已派出代表與施利的經理人接洽，並試探尼斯的意向。至於PSG，則把施利列作中場收購名單的第二選擇（首選為摩納哥中場法賓奴）；而巴塞隆拿就把他列為收購PSG中場華拉堤行動的備選方案。

第1單收購

Lamela could be as good as a new signing for Tottenham in 2017-18

Tottenham Hotspur’s attacking prowess in 2016-17 was hailed as arguably the Premier League’s best, with Harry Kane, Dele Alli, Christian Eriksen and Son Heung-min all starring as the North London club finished second in the standings.

However, one man that has almost been forgotten by everyone outside of Spurs supporter circles is Erik Lamela.

A hip injury kept the Argentina international out of action for the second half of the campaign, in what was surely a massively frustrating six months for the former Roma man.

Lamela’s time in the Premier League has been mixed, with a dire start being overcome and the gifted winger increasing his importance to Mauricio Pochettino’s side.

At the start of last season, the former River Plate man looked to have fully adapted to English football and appeared motivated in playing a key role in the club’s silverware hopes.

While the afore-mentioned quartet will continue to be Tottenham’s attacking leaders when the new campaign arrives, the potential availability of Lamela again could be as good as a new signing for Spurs.

The Argentine’s creativity, work-rate off the ball and technique have won over the club’s supporters and having the South American fit and ready to prove himself in 2017-18 can only be a really positive thing for the club.

Tottenham edge closer to £26 million asking price for Euro 2016 winner

Last week we relayed reports suggesting Sporting Lisbon had rejected a £21.5 million bid from Tottenham for midfielder Adrien Silva.

There was also a story in Portugal claiming Spurs were “committed” to signing the 28-year-old midfielder who was instrumental to Portugal’s Euro 2016 win.
Now, another report in Portugal suggests Tottenham are willing to make a second bid for Silva.

The story was spotted by HITC in the print edition of Portuguese newspaper Jornal de Noticas. It claims Sporting value Silva at £26 million — not too much more than Spurs initial £21.5 bid.

【now.com體育】據英國《太陽報》報道，原來車路士和熱刺將會在7月1 日推出最新球衣後，才會公佈新球員。

車路士和熱刺兩支英超球隊至今仍未公佈今夏簽入哪些球員，據了解，車路士已準備好大量彈藥買人，更有傳他們已跟曼城門將韋利卡巴尼路完成簽約。至於熱刺方面，似乎亦已準備好大手交易，因為領隊普捷天奴亦希望球隊來季可以再進一步。但據《太陽報》報道，他們會留待7月1 日推出最新球衣後，才會公佈轉會消息。

消息指，這個做法是市場策略，兩支球隊將會增加銷售點，讓球迷可以很快地印製紀念球衣，1件背上印上球員名字及號碼的新球衣，價錢大約是60鎊。而在推出最新球衣後才公佈新球員的做法，就可以令球隊在2017/18年球季來到前，額外增加數百萬收入。

Walker tells holidaymaker he is staying at Spurs

elow is the second pictureof Kyle Walker enjoying his holidays. In the first he told a group that he didn't want to lave Spurs and now this picture where he has stated is staying at Spurs.

It all rather contradicts what the national press are saying and reporters on Twitter who want to give us the impression they have the inside track on every story available.

They don't of course, you take an infamous Sky reporter, h seems to simply just read what is on the Internet and give non-committal answer based on that. We already know 'Sky Sources' is in fact the Internet.



Logic and common sense seem to go out of the window for many when it comes to reporting transfer stories. They started when we were banned from Europe and the press needed something to fill the pages. They then stopped it, but such was the popularity of a transfer story that the transfer rumour was quickly brought back and has been with us ever since.

If you want to sell a paper, sensationalise a non-event or make it up has become standard practice. The version in the British press and the version abroad, for foreign player transfer stories, is often completely different and the British press to a large extent simply ignore foreign transfer news. That is understandable as it would destroy a story they are trying to run so they keep the wool,over your eyes and many a Muppet falls for it.
